name: uderia-google
description: Gmail and Google Calendar integration. Provides read_emails, send_email, search_emails, list_calendar, create_event, and get_contacts tools. Requires user OAuth connection.

tool_schemas.name: read_emails
tool_schemas.description: Read recent emails from the user's Gmail inbox.

arguments.name: max_results
arguments.description: Maximum number of emails to return (default: 10, max: 50).

arguments.name: label
arguments.description: Gmail label to read from (default: INBOX).

tool_schemas.name: send_email
tool_schemas.description: Send an email via the user's Gmail account.

tool_schemas.name: search_emails
tool_schemas.description: Search Gmail using a query string (supports Gmail search syntax: from:, subject:, has:attachment, after:, before:, etc.).

arguments.name: time_min
arguments.description: Start time in RFC3339 format (e.g. 2026-05-01T00:00:00Z). Defaults to now.

tool_schemas.name: create_event
tool_schemas.description: Create a new Google Calendar event.

arguments.name: start_datetime
arguments.description: Start time in RFC3339 format, e.g. 2026-05-15T10:00:00+02:00.

tool_schemas.name: get_contacts
tool_schemas.description: Search the user's Google Contacts by name or email.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.label: Google OAuth Client ID
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console (APIs & Services → Credentials).

GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.label: Google OAuth Client Secret
GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from Google Cloud Console.

SCOPES.label: OAuth Scopes
SCOPES.description: Comma-separated Google OAuth scopes. Defaults to gmail.readonly, gmail.send, gmail.modify, calendar.readonly, calendar.events.

auth_schema.description: Connect your Google account to enable Gmail and Calendar tools.
